intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“hat shop -> mirror -> rude question -> waiting chair -> mustn't -> regretted -> needn't have said -> terrible tie -> too many ties and hats -> lighthouse hat”的帽店争论链读顺。注意 title 要有一点讽刺但不要喊，needn't、mustn't、needn't have said 要读清楚，妻子的 comeback 要自信平稳。

sentences.text: 'Do you call that a hat?' I said to my wife.
sentences.focus_zh: 这句不是普通提问，而是 sarcastic question。Do you call that a hat 要读出轻微讽刺，但不要变成大喊。

sentences.text: 'You needn't be so rude about it,' my wife answered as she looked at herself in the mirror.
sentences.focus_zh: needn't 是 don't need to；rude 是不礼貌。后半句 as she looked at herself in the mirror 要读成她一边照镜子一边回答。

sentences.text: I sat down on one of those modern chairs with holes in it and waited.
sentences.focus_zh: modern chairs with holes in it 是有洞的新式椅子；sat down 和 waited 要读出坐下等人的动作。

sentences.text: We had been in the hat shop for half an hour and my wife was still in front of the mirror.
sentences.focus_zh: had been in the hat shop 表示已经待了一段时间；half an hour 是三十分钟；still in front of the mirror 读出等待已经很久。
focus_words: still in front of the mirror

sentences.text: 'We mustn't buy things we don't need,' I remarked suddenly. I regretted saying it almost at once.
sentences.focus_zh: mustn't 比 needn't 更强，像规则或警告；remarked suddenly 后要让语气突然一点；regretted saying it almost at once 读出马上后悔。

sentences.text: 'You needn't have said that,' my wife answered. 'I needn't remind you of that terrible tie you bought yesterday.'
sentences.focus_zh: needn't have said 表示话已经说出口，但本来没必要说；remind you of that terrible tie 是妻子的反击，语气要稳。

sentences.text: 'I find it beautiful,' I said. 'A man can never have too many ties.' 'And a woman can't have too many hats,' she answered.
sentences.focus_zh: I find it beautiful 是我觉得它好看；can never have too many 是夸张说法。最后 hats 和 ties 的对称要读出 comeback 的节奏。

sentences.text: Ten minutes later we walked out of the shop together. My wife was wearing a hat that looked like a lighthouse!
sentences.focus_zh: Ten minutes later 是结尾时间跳转；looked like a lighthouse 是画面笑点。lighthouse 要读清楚，像海边给船指路的灯塔。
